headline: Nasdaq (NDAQ) Stock Looks Slightly Expensive At Today’s Price
summary: Nasdaq stock sits in an interesting spot today, with an Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate that points to a roughly fair price while traditional earnings multiples screen the shares as expensive. That mixed message comes after a strong 3 year run and leaves investors weighing whether the recent pullback has reset the risk reward or simply taken some heat out of a stock that was already pricing in a lot of good news. Nasdaq has returned 80.1% over the past 3 years, which puts recent...

headline: Is the Stock Market Open Today? Here Are the Trading Hours Ahead of the Fourth of July.
summary: The Fourth of July is nearly here—and since the holiday falls on a Saturday this year, traders may be looking forward to a long weekend.  Independence Day, as the name suggests, honors American nationhood by commemorating the adoption of the Declaration of Independence exactly 250 years ago.  Is the Stock Market Open or Closed Today?

headline: Why Nasdaq (NDAQ) Is Up 9.0% After Record IPO Haul And Trump Accounts Spotlight
summary: In recent days, Nasdaq reported its strongest first half for U.S. listings in history, with US$129.30 billion raised from new offerings and seven of the year’s ten largest IPOs choosing its markets. At the same time, the upcoming launch of the “Trump Accounts” child investment program, with a US$1,000 Treasury-funded index contribution, has highlighted Nasdaq’s central role in promoting broad market participation and financial literacy. We’ll now examine how Nasdaq’s record listings momentum...
